summary: Comprehensive testing of JobHuntPro Content Studio MVP - Backend API testing revealed critical LLM budget issues blocking core functionality, while frontend UI and navigation work correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM API budget exceeded - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.004405000000000001, Max budget: 0.001
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all AI script generation functionality and Magic Button feature

critical_bugs.issue: Fails due to dependency on script generation which is blocked by budget limits
critical_bugs.impact: Core Magic Button feature completely non-functional

minor_issues.issue: TTS service not available - Google Cloud credentials missing
minor_issues.impact: Voiceover generation not working, but app designed to handle graceful fallback

minor_issues.issue: Form data handling requires specific format, SSL validation issues with some URLs
minor_issues.impact: URL scraping may fail for certain websites

integration_issues.issue: Frontend correctly sends requests but backend fails due to budget limits

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct dark theme
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Assets, Scripts, Create, Gallery) working
Magic Button form inputs functional (URL, Product Name, Target Audience)
Script Generator page framework selection and form inputs working
Create Content page with multi-format support (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) working
Asset Manager page with upload zones for images, videos, documents visible
Poster creation UI functional (backend poster creation API working)
Dark theme implementation with proper fonts and color scheme
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: LLM API budget exceeded - need to either increase budget limits or get new API key for Emergent LLM service. This blocks core AI script generation and Magic Button functionality.
success_percentage: Backend: 45% (5/11 APIs working), Frontend: 95% (all UI elements functional, integration blocked by backend budget issue)
